description_long: This is a modern desk featuring a transparent glass tabletop supported by a combination of wooden and metal elements. The left side of the desk has a raised wooden compartment, possibly a drawer or storage box, supported by angled wooden legs. The right side is anchored by a blocky wooden pedestal with three visible horizontal drawer fronts, suggesting ample storage. The desk's support structure includes elegantly curved wooden beams that connect the left compartment to the right pedestal, adding a sculptural and contemporary touch. The materials and design indicate a high-end, stylish piece suitable for professional or creative environments. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a blend of natural wood textures and sleek glass.
description: A modern desk with a glass top, wooden drawers, and sculptural curved wooden supports, combining storage and style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the glass top, left storage compartment, and right pedestal with drawers, highlighting the curved wooden supports.
description_view_1: Front view focused on the right pedestal with three horizontal drawers and the glass top above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the glass top, right pedestal, and the left storage compartment with angled supports.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the back of the left storage compartment and the supporting wooden legs.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the drawers and storage compartment accessible, with the glass top providing a work surface and the drawers on the right for storage.
attribute_usage_context: executive workstation or creative design desk
